push-up.description:
From a high plank, lower chest toward the floor 
with elbows ~45° to torso, then press back to full extension without losing body line.

body-row.description:
Under a low bar or sturdy table, hold an overhand 
grip and keep your body straight like a plank as you pull your chest to the bar, then lower under control.
tips: Keep ribs down and glutes tight
Touch chest to bar each rep if possible

jumping-squat.description:
Squat down and explode upward into a jump, landing
softly and immediately moving into the next rep with control.
tips: Load hips and keep chest proud

hollow-body-crunch.description:
Lie supine, flatten your lower back to the floor, 
lift shoulders and legs to create a hollow curve, then perform small controlled crunches.
tips: Reach long through fingers and toes

pike-stand.description:
From a downward-dog shape, walk your feet toward 
your hands to stack hips over shoulders. Hold the inverted V position while pressing the floor away.
tips: Push tall through shoulders; don't sink
Keep legs straight and heels lifted

active-hang.description:
Hang from a pull-up bar with straight arms and 
engage shoulders by pulling them slightly down and back. Hold without bending elbows.
tips: Grip the bar evenly and breathe

deep-squat.description: Descend into the deepest squat your mobility allows, keeping heels grounded and spine neutral. Hold the bottom position.
tips: Keep chest up and back flat
Breathe deeply and relax into the position

arch-up.description:
Lying prone, lift chest and legs off the floor by 
squeezing glutes and upper back, creating an arch through the spine.
tips: Reach long through fingers and toes

horse-stance.description: Stand with feet wide and toes slightly out. Sink hips to a half-squat and hold the position with an upright torso.
tips: Keep chest lifted and core braced

swimmer.description:
Lying prone, lift opposite arm and leg alternately
in a fluttering motion while keeping the trunk stable.
tips: Squeeze glutes to protect low back

pull-up.description: From a dead hang, pull your body up until chin clears the bar, then lower with control back to full extension.

dip.description: On parallel bars, lower your body until shoulders dip below elbows, then press back to lockout with control.
tips: Slight forward lean for chest focus

elevated-pistol-squat.description: Stand on an elevated surface on one leg. Lower into a single-leg squat while extending the other leg forward, then drive back up.
tips: Keep standing knee tracking over toes

lying-knee-twist.description: Lying supine with arms extended, bring knees toward chest then rotate them side to side while keeping shoulders grounded.

hollow-body-hold.description: Lie supine, press lower back into floor, lift shoulders and legs creating a hollow banana shape. Hold the position.
tips: Lower back must stay pressed to floor
Arms extended overhead or by sides

sl-glute-bridge-raise.description: Perform controlled reps of the single-leg bridge, lifting and lowering through full hip extension while maintaining pelvic control.
tips: Keep knee of working leg tracking forward

archer-bodyrow.description: In the body row position, perform rows while extending one arm to the side, shifting weight to the pulling arm.
tips: Pull with one arm while the other assists minimally

side-to-side-push-up.description: From push-up position, shift weight to one side while lowering, then push up and shift to the other side.
tips: Full range of motion on each side

arch-up-hold.description: Lying prone, lift chest and legs off the floor and hold the arched position with sustained muscle tension.

archer-squat.description: Stand wide, shift weight to one leg while squatting, keeping the other leg straight. Alternate sides.

step-up.description: Place one foot on a box/step. Drive through the whole foot to stand tall on the box, then lower with control.
tips: Lean slightly forward to load glute
Avoid pushing off the back leg
